channel.title: Night Feather Stories
channel.description: Relaxing bedtime stories to calm your mind and help you drift to sleep. Narrated with care for peaceful nights.
channel.itunes:author: Night Feather Stories

item.title: The clock hadn't worked for years... then it started ticking again | Sleep Story
item.description: A relaxing sleep story to help you unwind and fall asleep. Tonight's story: The clock hadn't worked for years then it started ticking again.

item.title: The Forgotten Notebook Found in the Silent Attic | Sleep Story
item.description:
A relaxing sleep story designed to help you unwind and fall asleep.

Tonight you'll hear "The Forgotten Notebook Found in the Silent Attic."

In the quiet stillness of an attic, a forgotten wooden box held a secret. Discover the elegant script of a faded blue notebook, filled with simple, comforting recipes. Feel the texture of old paper and the gentle scent of time as we bring a quiet kitchen back to life, filling the air with warmth and simple joy.

⏱️ Chapters
00:00 Intro
00:40 Story
40:00 Gentle transition
50:00 Ambient music

🌙 New sleep stories every week.

If you enjoy calm bedtime stories and peaceful storytelling designed to help you relax and fall asleep, consider subscribing for more quiet tales.

#sleepstories #bedtimestories #relaxingstories #asmr #storytelling #storytelling #relaxation #cozycooking

item.title: The Forgotten Chest in the Closet | Sleep Story
The Forgotten Music Box That Began to Play Again | Sleep Story
The Clock Forgotten in the Attic for Decades
item.description: A relaxing story set in a calm and peaceful atmosphere. Tonight you'll hear: The Clock Forgotten in the Attic for Decades. New relaxing stories every week.
